ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: You can access Obsidian Local REST API via the following URLs:
ast.target: 您可以通过以下URL访问Obsidian本地REST API：

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Comprehensive documentation of what API endpoints are available can be found in the online docs.
ast.target: 有关可用API端点的全面文档可以在 在线文档中找到。

ast.name: innerHTML
ast.source: Your certificate has expired! You must re-generate your certificate below by pressing the "Re-generate Certificates" button below in order to connect securely to this API.
ast.target: 您的证书已过期！ 您必须重新生成证书以安全地连接到此API。 请按下下面的“重新生成证书”按钮进行操作。

ast.name: error
ast.source: ACTION NEEDED: require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings() is not supported in your version of Node
ast.target: ACTION NEEDED: require('iconv-lite').extendNodeEncodings() is not supported in your version of Node

ast.name: error
ast.source: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding
ast.target: Iconv-lite warning: decode()-ing strings is deprecated. Refer to https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Use-Buffers-when-decoding

ast.name: error
ast.source: iconv-lite warning: javascript files use encoding different from utf-8. See https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings for more info.
ast.target: iconv-lite warning: javascript files use encoding different from utf-8. See https://github.com/ashtuchkin/iconv-lite/wiki/Javascript-source-file-encodings for more info.

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom daily note settings found!
ast.target: No custom daily note settings found!

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom weekly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每周笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom monthly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义每月笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom quarterly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义季度笔记设置！

ast.name: info
ast.source: No custom yearly note settings found!
ast.target: 未找到自定义年度笔记设置！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enables a non-encrypted (HTTP) server on the port designated below.  By default this plugin requires a secure HTTPS connection, but in safe environments you may turn on the non-encrypted server to simplify interacting with the API. Interactions with the API will still require the API Key shown above.  Under no circumstances is it recommended that you expose this service to the internet, especially if you turn on this feature!
ast.target: 启用非加密（HTTP）服务器，端口由下面指定。默认情况下，此插件要求安全的HTTPS连接，但在安全的环境中，您可以打开非加密服务器以简化与API的交互。与API的交互仍然需要上述显示的API密钥。在任何情况下都不建议将此服务暴露在互联网上，特别是如果您启用了此功能！

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Pressing this button will cause your certificate,
        private key, public key, and API key to be regenerated.
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.
ast.target:
按下此按钮将导致您的证书、私钥、公钥和API密钥被重新生成。
        当您点击后，此设置面板将被关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
Pressing this button will reset this plugin's
        settings to defaults.
        This settings panel will be closed when you press this.
ast.target:
按此按钮将重置插件的设置为默认值。
        当您按下此按钮时，该设置面板将被关闭。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Advanced settings are dangerous and may make your environment less secure.
ast.target: 高级设置可能使您的环境变得不安全。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
This controls whether the HTTPs server is enabled.  You almost certainly want to leave this switch in its default state ('on'),
          but may find it useful to turn this switch off for
          troubleshooting.
ast.target: 此选项控制HTTPS服务器的启用状态。您几乎肯定希望将其保持在默认状态（“打开”），但可能在故障排除时发现关闭此开关很有用。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: This configures the port on which your REST API will listen for HTTPS connections.  It is recommended that you leave this port with its default setting as tools integrating with this API may expect the default port to be in use.  Under no circumstances is it recommended that you expose this service directly to the internet.
ast.target: 此配置用于设置REST API监听HTTPS连接的端口。建议您保留其默认设置，因为与该API集成的工具可能会期望使用默认端口。在任何情况下都不建议直接将该服务暴露在互联网上。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source:
List of extra hostnames to add
          to your certificate's \`subjectAltName\` field.
          One hostname per line.
          You must click the "Re-generate Certificates" button above after changing this value
          for this to have an effect.  This is useful for
          situations in which you are accessing Obsidian
          from a hostname other than the host on which
          it is running.
ast.target:
要添加到证书的 \`subjectAltName\` 字段的额外主机名列表。
          每行一个主机名。
          更改此值后必须点击上面的“重新生成证书”按钮才能生效。这对于以下情况非常有用：您从运行Obsidian的主机以外的其他主机访问它。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate is not valid yet or has expired.
ast.target: 证书尚未生效或已过期。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate has an unsupported critical extension.
ast.target: 证书包含不受支持的关键扩展。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate keyUsage or basicConstraints conflict or indicate that the certificate is not a CA. If the certificate is the only one in the chain or isn't the first then the certificate must be a valid CA.
ast.target: 证书的keyUsage或basicConstraints冲突，或者表明该证书不是CA。如果证书是链中的唯一一个或不是第一个，则该证书必须是有效的CA。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Certificate basicConstraints indicates the certificate is not a CA.
ast.target: 证书的基本约束表明该证书不是CA。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 证书的基本约束路径长度约束被违反。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected message. Received TLS record out of order.
ast.target: 意外的消息。收到乱序的TLS记录。

ast.name: message
ast.source: TLS version change is disallowed during renegotiation.
ast.target: 在重协商期间不允许更改TLS版本。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid Certificate message. Message too short.
ast.target: 无效证书消息。消息太短。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Invalid key parameters. Only RSA is supported.

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的证书验证。消息太短。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 证书验证中有错误的签名。

ast.name: message
ast.target: 无效的服务器Hello完成消息。长度无效。

ast.name: message
ast.source: No server certificate provided. Not enough security.
ast.target: 没有提供服务器证书。安全性不足。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Could not decrypt record or bad MAC.

ast.name: message
ast.source: Cannot initiate handshake as a server.
ast.target: 作为服务器，无法启动握手。

ast.name: message
ast.source: Unexpected block-seq-ind on same line with key
ast.target: 意外在同一行上遇到块序列指示符与密钥

ast.name: message
ast.target: 需要一个单独的'？查询='参数。

ast.name: name
ast.target: 证书.TBSCertificate有效期.生效前(一般化)

ast.name: name
ast.target: 证书.TBSCertificate有效期.失效后(一般化)

ast.name: text
ast.source: For example, the following request will return all notes in the root directory of your vault:
ast.target: 例如，以下请求将返回您保险库根目录中的所有笔记：

ast.name: text
ast.source:
The settings below are potentially dangerous and
          are intended for use only by people who know what
          they are doing. Do not change any of these settings if
          you do not understand what that setting is used for
          and what security impacts changing that setting will have.
ast.target:
下面的设置可能具有潜在危险，并且仅适用于了解情况的人使用。
          如果您不了解该设置的用途以及更改该设置的安全影响，请不要更改这些设置。

ast.name: text
ast.source:
Use of this software is licensed to you under the
          MIT license, and it is important that you understand that 
          this license provides you with no warranty.
          For the complete license text please see
ast.target:
本软件的使用受MIT许可证约束，并且重要的是您应该明白这个许可证向您提供没有任何保证。
          请参阅完整的许可文本以获取更多信息。

ast.name: title
ast.source: Disabled.  You can enable this in 'Settings' below.
ast.target: 禁用。您可以启用此功能在下面的“设置”中.
